title: Compliance Follow-up: Workspace Audit
description: Review the workspace configuration summary (CONFIG_SUMMARY.md) against the internal Secret Handling Policy (article KB-202). If the configuration is compliant, set this task's priority to 'low' and add the 'audit-passed' tag. If non-compliant, set priority to 'high' and add 'action-required' tag. This task must be updated after the policy review.

title: Renew SSL Certificates for api.enterprise.com
description: The main API SSL certificate expires on 2025-04-10. Contact the certificate authority and renew before expiration. After renewal, update the load balancer configurations.

title: Compliance Follow-up: Workspace Audit (prior cycle)
description: Prior-cycle workspace configuration compliance audit. Superseded by TASK-47 (current cycle); retained only for historical reference and no longer actively tracked.
